'''Vibroscalpels''' were a specialized type of [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] that had numerous medical applications due to its ability to cut precisely and effortlessly.

==Description==
Vibroscalpels were medical tools which allowed for precise and effortless incisions.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> Miniaturized vibroscalpels were standard equipment fitted to [[MD-4 medical droid]]s to assist them in performing delicate surgery.<ref name="SWS" />

==History==
The [[Medic/Legends|medic]] at the [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company|ORO]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility on [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]] used a vibroscalpel and [[Synthflesh/Legends|synthflesh]] to reattach [[Gerd]]'s thumb on a [[Miner/Legends|miner]].<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref> Vibroscalpels were used for a variety of surgical procedures at [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Rimsoo]] units during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="MedStarI">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>

The [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Bink Kitik]] used a vibroscalpel to cut through [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]]. She wondered if the designers of the medical instrument ever realized how useful it would be to someone in her profession but realized they probably did not.<ref name="Scoundrel">''[[Scoundrels]]''</ref> Microsurgical vibroscapels were affixed to the [[Scan grid|device]] used to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back junior novelization">[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' junior novel]]</ref>
